original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求这套首饰放在一个物体上（比如木桌，桌子或者其他）比例合适，有一个欧洲男性和满脸惊喜的女性
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description] High-end Amazon lifestyle product photography. In the sharp foreground, the [Subject Lock] luxury three-piece bridal jewelry set (tiara, V-drop necklace, chandelier earrings) is elegantly arranged on a polished, dark walnut wooden table, showcasing the silver Baroque scrollwork and pear-cut crystal details. The lighting highlights the brilliance of the stones. In the softly blurred background (bokeh), a romantic scene unfolds: a handsome European male is looking affectionately at a European female who has a genuinely surprised and delighted expression (hands covering mouth in joy). Warm, cozy ambient lighting.

[Text & UI Layout] Minimalist and premium design. Main copy "The Perfect Surprise" in an elegant, thin serif font (white or metallic gold) positioned in the upper negative space. Sub-copy "Timeless Elegance" in a smaller sans-serif font below the title.
layout_logic: Composition should use a shallow depth of field. Place the jewelry set in the bottom 40% of the frame (sharp focus) to anchor the product. Place the couple in the top 60% (soft focus) to provide emotional context without competing for visual attention. Text should be placed in the 'air' around the couple's heads.
